declarations.description:
The auro-sidenav element provides users a way to create navigational interfaces on the left-hand
side of a page to navigate to separate pages or different sections within the same page.
declarations.name: AuroSideNav

slots.description: Defines what to use as the header of the sidenav.
slots.name: heading

slots.description: Default slot of the sidenav. Please construct using auro-sidenavitems and auro-sidenavsections.

members.name: register

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The name of element that you want to register to.

members.description: This will register this element with the browser.

members.name: handleSlotChange
members.description: Used to update sidenavitem tiers on construction and

members.name: handleMouseDown

parameters.name: event
parameters.description: Mousedown event.

members.description: Used to update selected menu when navigating in-page content.

members.name: handleKeyDown

parameters.name: event
parameters.description: Event object from the browser.

members.description: Manage Enter keyboard events.

members.name: initItems
members.description: Initializes list of sidenavitems in the DOM. This must re-run whenever slotted items change.

members.name: selectItem

parameters.name: selectedItem
parameters.description: Item to be selected.

members.description: Updates items so that only specified item is selected.

members.name: static
members.description: When applied the sidenav will expand to an open state and can't be collapsed.

attributes.name: static
attributes.description: When applied the sidenav will expand to an open state and can't be collapsed.

declarations.description: The auro-sidenavitem element can be used to create a link within the auro-sidenav.
declarations.name: AuroSideNavItem

members.name: register

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The name of element that you want to register to.

members.description: This will register this element with the browser.

members.name: _createRefs
members.description: Create usable refs to internal elements

members.name: renderLayoutDefault
members.description: Renders the default layout for the hyperlink.

members.name: renderLayoutCTA
members.description: Renders the cta layout for the hyperlink.

members.name: getMarkup
members.description: Generates an object containing CSS classes based on the properties of the component.
Defines ARIA roles; currently supports `button` for extended experiences.
members.name: role
safeUri
members.description:
Returns a safe URI based on the provided `href` and `relative` parameters.
If `href` is truthy, it generates a safe URL using the `safeUrl` function.
Otherwise, it returns an empty string.

members.name: includesDomain
members.description:
Checks whether the provided URI (if available) includes the 'http' protocol.
If the URI is truthy, it examines whether it contains 'http'.
Otherwise, it returns false.

members.name: safeUrl

parameters.name: href
parameters.description: The original URL.

parameters.name: relative
parameters.description: Indicates whether the URL is relative.

members.description:
Generates a safe URL based on the provided `href` and `relative` parameters.
If `href` is falsy, it returns `undefined`.

members.name: generateIconHtml

parameters.name: svgContent
parameters.description: The SVG content to be embedded.

members.description: Generates an HTML element containing an SVG icon based on the provided `svgContent`.

members.name: targetIcon

parameters.name: target
parameters.description: The target attribute of the anchor element.

members.description: Generates an icon HTML element based on the target attribute.

members.name: getTabState

parameters.name: tabIsActive
parameters.description: Indicates whether the tab is active.

members.description: Returns the state of a tab as a string.

members.name: getRelType

parameters.name: target
parameters.description: The target attribute of the anchor element.

parameters.name: rel
parameters.description: The rel attribute of the anchor element.

members.description: Gets the rel attribute value based on target and rel values.

members.name: ariaPressedState

parameters.name: ariaPressed
parameters.description: The initial value of the ARIA pressed state.

members.description: Sets the ARIA pressed state based on user interactions.

members.name: appearance
members.description: Defines whether the component will be on lighter or darker backgrounds.

members.name: download
members.description: If true, the linked resource will be downloaded when the hyperlink is clicked.

members.name: relative
members.description: If true, the auto URL re-write feature will be disabled.

members.name: ondark
members.description: DEPRECATED - use `appearance` instead.

members.name: variant
members.description: Sets button variant option.

members.name: href
members.description: Defines the URL of the linked page.

members.name: rel
members.description: Defines the relationship between the current document and the linked document.

members.name: target
members.description: Defines where to open the linked document.

members.name: type
members.description: Defines the type of hyperlink; accepts `nav` or `cta`.

members.name: fluid
members.description: If true and `type="cta"`, the hyperlink will have a fluid-width UI.

members.name: referrerpolicy
members.description: If true, sets `strict-origin-when-cross-origin` to control the referrer information sent with requests.

cssParts.description: Allows styling to be applied to the `a` element.
cssParts.name: link

cssParts.description: Allows styling to be applied to the icon that appears next to the hyperlink.
cssParts.name: targetIcon

attributes.name: appearance
attributes.description: Defines whether the component will be on lighter or darker backgrounds.

attributes.name: href
attributes.description: Defines the URL of the linked page.

attributes.name: rel
attributes.description: Defines the relationship between the current document and the linked document.

attributes.name: target
attributes.description: Defines where to open the linked document.

attributes.name: download
attributes.description: If true, the linked resource will be downloaded when the hyperlink is clicked.

attributes.name: relative
attributes.description: If true, the auto URL re-write feature will be disabled.

attributes.name: ondark
attributes.description: DEPRECATED - use `appearance` instead.

attributes.name: type
attributes.description: Defines the type of hyperlink; accepts `nav` or `cta`.

attributes.name: fluid
attributes.description: If true and `type="cta"`, the hyperlink will have a fluid-width UI.

attributes.name: referrerpolicy
attributes.description: If true, sets `strict-origin-when-cross-origin` to control the referrer information sent with requests.

attributes.name: variant
attributes.description: Sets button variant option.

declarations.description: The auro-sidenavsection element can be used to create an accordion of auro-sidenavitems within the auro-sidenav.
declarations.name: AuroSideNavSection

members.name: register

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The name of element that you want to register to.

members.description: This will register this element with the browser.

members.name: renderChevronIcons
members.description: Renders the chevron icons.

members.name: generateRandomLetters

parameters.name: length
parameters.description: The number of characters to generate in the string.

members.description: Generates a random string of letters.

members.name: toggle
members.description: Toggles the visibility of the accordion content.

members.name: handleButtonClick

parameters.name: event
parameters.description: The event object.

members.description: Toggles the visibility of the accordion content when button gets clicked.

members.name: expanded
members.description: If set, the accordion is expanded.

members.name: alignRight
members.description: If set, the trigger content will align right.

members.name: emphasis
members.description: If set, emphasis styles will be applied to the auro-accordions.

members.name: grouped
members.description: Attribute will be set on accordion when it appears in an accordion group.

members.name: chevron
members.description: Sets chevron variant option. Possible values are: `none`, `right`.

members.name: variant
members.description: Sets accordion variant option. Possible values are: `sm`, `lg`.

members.name: disabled
members.description: If set, the accordion is disabled and have reduced opacity.

slots.description: Default slot for the accordion content.
Defines the content of the trigger element.
slots.name: trigger

cssParts.description: Apply CSS to the accordion content.
cssParts.name: content

attributes.name: alignRight
attributes.description: If set, the trigger content will align right.

attributes.name: expanded
attributes.description: If set, the accordion is expanded.

attributes.name: emphasis
attributes.description: If set, emphasis styles will be applied to the auro-accordions.

attributes.name: grouped
attributes.description: Attribute will be set on accordion when it appears in an accordion group.

attributes.name: chevron
attributes.description: Sets chevron variant option. Possible values are: `none`, `right`.

attributes.name: variant
attributes.description: Sets accordion variant option. Possible values are: `sm`, `lg`.

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description: If set, the accordion is disabled and have reduced opacity.

events.name: toggleExpanded
events.description: Notifies that the accordion has been expanded or closed.
